name: Raisin-Cinnamon Doughnut
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together all dry ingredients.
2. Cut in shortening with a pastry cutter or two knives until the mixture resembles small lumps.
3. Stir in milk and raisins.
4. Turn dough onto a lightly floured board.
5. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness.
6. Cut into rounds using a floured doughnut cutter.
7. Arrange doughnuts on cookie sheets.
8. Brush with melted butter.
9. Bake for 12 minutes at 425°F.
10. Brush again with melted butter.
11. Combine the sugar and cinnamon to make cinnamon sugar.
Makes 1 dozen.
